title: Ivyline Arley Bee Planter in Yellow - Premium Quality & Waterproof - Stylish Lightweight Indoor Earthenware Flower Houseplant Pot - D17.5cm x H17cm
features: Premium glaze – The Ivyline Arley Planter in Yellow is made with a superb high-quality glaze that gives it a premium sheen when it catches the light.
Waterproof – Sealed against unwanted water dribbles, the Arley indoor houseplant pot will cradle your plant and keep in moisture when you water.
Premium quality – Crafted with care, this planter is a premium quality product that will last for many seasons – dare we say – it might even outlive the houseplants placed inside!
Made in Europe – Ivyline care about sustainability and that’s why we make a conscious effort to outsource craftsmanship as close to home as possible, reducing carbon emissions.
Lightweight – Weighing less than an average bag of flour, the Arley bee planter in yellow is a lightweight item that’s easy to move around the house when it’s time to clean.
description: From the manufacturer Arley Bee Planter in Yellow The Ivyline Arley Bee Planter in Yellow is made to impress, with its eye-catching yellow glaze and geometric bee decoration. This earthenware planter is made in Europe and features a premium quality glaze, lightweight design and waterproof finish. The bold yellow colour and splendid glossy sheen look luxurious with its embossed bee pattern. Style yours with a parlour palm to encapsulate elegance.
